description: Implementing the Streamlit UI components to display clarification questions from the paused LangGraph execution and submit user answers to resume the workflow.

userStories.title: Display Clarification Questions
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want to see a list of clarification questions generated by the AI in the Streamlit UI, so that I can understand what missing context is needed to properly tailor my resume.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Viewing clarification questions for a paused job
Given a job application sub-graph is paused at the NEEDS_CLARIFICATION state
and Given the state contains a list of ClarificationQuestion objects
When I select the job in the Streamlit UI
Then I see the questions rendered according to their type (text input or multiple choice)
and Then 'Let LLM decide' is available as a valid option for multiple choice questions

tasks.description: Create a Streamlit rendering function for ClarificationQuestion objects
Implement UI logic to handle both 'multiple_choice' and 'text' question types
Read the paused graph state via SqliteSaver checkpointer to extract clarification_questions

userStories.title: Submit Answers & Resume Workflow
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want to submit my answers and resume the paused LangGraph workflow, so that the AI can proceed to draft the resume strategy and diffs.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Submitting answers to clarification questions
Given I have filled out the answers to the clarification questions in the UI
When I click the submit button
Then the answers are saved to the graph state as user_clarification_answers
and Then the graph execution is resumed
and Then the job_tracker.json status is updated to reflect the graph is running

tasks.description: Add a form submit button to collect user_clarification_answers into a dictionary
Implement graph.update_state to inject the answers into the paused Child Sub-Graph
Trigger the resumption of the graph using graph.stream with None input
Synchronize the updated status back to job_tracker.json
